use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MAJOR DEPRESSIVE DISORDER(MDD);ALTHOUGH THE MECHANISM OF THE ANTIDEPRESSANT ACTION OF DULOXETINE IN HUMANS IS UNKNOWN, IT IS BELIEVED TO BE RELATED TO ITS POTENTIATION OF SERATONERGIC AND NORADRENERGIC ACTIVITY IN THE CNS
